⚙️ Settings

Configure your church information and API settings

Church Information

This will be added to the end of your emails

Newsletter Subscribers

Add email addresses (one per line) for your newsletter distribution list.

API Configuration

Configure your API keys in the .env.local file.

Get your key from platform.openai.com

Get your key from resend.com

📝 Environment Variables (.env.local)

NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=your-supabase-url
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your-anon-key
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-your-openai-key
RESEND_API_KEY=re-your-resend-key
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000

Subscription Plan

Free Plan10 AI generations per month
